The '''[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] Quick Draw''' was a fast firing weapon designed to [[Death/Legends|kill]] off an opponent before they had the chance to react. Used 4,000 years before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], these hold-out blasters were used to kill a target without causing serious damage.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
